## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run security`

## Public Surface Check

- [ ] No tokens, cookie material, or machine-specific absolute paths were added
- [ ] Local-only runtime boundaries remain intact, or docs were updated to match the change
- [ ] Any required GitHub UI follow-up is called out explicitly
